| This stupendous irrigation project,


which has been going on during the
past year, is being watched with
interest by the irrigation authorities
at Washington. Outside of the big
| irrigation projects in Utah. instituted
| by the Mormons. it is the first real
effort to reclaim the desert on large
scale in the west The great dam at
Miner raises the level of the Snake
river 40 feet to the level of the canal
on tn south side of the stream, the


dimensions of which are so feet wide


at the bottom and 1870 feet wide at


the top of the bank. The water at


full flow in the canal will be 10 feet
deep and 112 feet wide at the surface.
The da mis- 1900 feet long, 10 feet
high and 400 feet through at the
base.


The main canal, now complete, Is
&c miles long, and gasoline launches


are to be placed upon it for the rapid
transportation of scows carrying





of the 26th mile it is divided into


high and low line canals, which con-
tinue nearly so miles westward. In


the completed system there will be


nearly 1000 miles of main canals and


laterals, making 1t the largest irri-
gated tract on the western hemisphere


under one canal. The water supply
4 -
with one foot of water per month.
Miner, the location of the dam. is
rs miles west of Pocatello and SO


miles down stream from American
Falls, where the Oregon Short Line
railroad crosses the Snake river The
Snake river, except about 10000


acres, which are irrigated from the


north side of the dam. Along the
tract are the famous Twin falls in
Snake river. 1874 feet high; the great
Shoshone falls. 210 feet high; Anger
and Salmon falls. These four great
cataracts will supply unlimited pow
er FOR all purposes-railways cleo
=, trio lighting and heating. ana MIN
lufacturing. Already plant develop
| ing 10000 horsepower has been con-
| structed at Shoshone falls and will
| soon be ready.


The development of the plateau
already is well under way in antici-
| patton of the blossoming of the irri-
cation area. A big beet sugar fac
tory is to be erected at Twin Falls
) by Cleveland millionaire named
Shaw. which will employ 400 men


all the time. A railroad connecting


the Oregon Short Line is under CON
struction and is TO have trains run


ming by May l. The town of Buhl
already has been chartered. and will


be laid out the coming summer not


far away from Twin Falls.
